violations.text: There was no person that completed a food safety course at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen near the food prep sink. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
Sheet pans were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as sausage and other prepared foods) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use the dishwasher for rinsing ONLY. All dishes and utensils to be washed and sanitized at the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked with an asterisk. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Eggplant, potatoes, and spinach were placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep/covered. Food was moved to sheet pans to properly cool. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
